title: Color Palette
description: The Color Palette component enables selecting colors using preview, picker, swatches, and input sub-components. Supports two-way binding, readonly/disabled states, and keyboard/mouse interactions.

sections.title: Preview
sections.description: Show a live color preview using ax-color-palette-preview.

sections.title: Full options
sections.description: An example using all sub-components inside ax-color-palette.

sections.title: Custom swatches and favorites
sections.description: Provide custom swatch colors and a favorites list using ax-color-palette-swatches and ax-color-palette-favorite.

props.name: value
props.description: Selected color value (two-way bindable). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables user interaction. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Prevents changing value while allowing focus. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the component's tabindex. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Visual validation state. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name associated with the value. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Deprecated: use ngModelChange instead. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Detailed value change event (with old/new values). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when readonly changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when disabled changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires when the component gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an internal option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an internal option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Synchronizes internal RGBA and UI state with the parent palette value.
 *
 * Called when the parent emits onValueChanged. Updates local RGBA from the parent
 * value, recalculates gradient and pointer when the user is not actively changing
 * the color, and requests change detection.
 *
 * @returns void
 */
parentColorChanged(): void

props.name: colors
props.description: List of color objects; each item has a 'code' string.
